title: pentacalia yanethiarum
intro: Pentacalia yanethiarum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in the Andean region of South America. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Pentacalia yanethiarum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a digestive aid. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the plant in traditional medicine blends.
